## Risk & Rollback

- **Risk**: Low / Medium / High
- **Rollback**: `git revert <squash-merge-sha>` via a new governed Issue and Draft PR

## Review & Merge Route

**Direct push to `master` is forbidden.** Every change goes through this PR.

**Default approval:** One human non-author reviewer required.

**Owner PR-only bypass:** Permitted only with explicit documented reason and verifiable evidence. Case-specific. Never a direct push.

**NekoDreamSensei:** Optional. @mention when domain expertise is needed. Never a mandatory blocker.
